task_description: Integrate OpenTelemetry observability (logs, metrics, and traces) into the kiro-mobile Flutter app using the flutterrific_opentelemetry plugin. Telemetry data should be exported to an OpenTelemetry backend via OTLP. This includes initializing OTel in main.dart, instrumenting HTTP API calls with trace spans, bridging existing debug logging to OTel, and making the OTLP endpoint configurable via compile-time flags.

verification.summary: flutter pub get succeeds. flutter analyze reports 10 issues, all pre-existing (3 errors in test/views/ from FakeAuthManager, 3 warnings for unused elements, 4 infos for use_build_context_synchronously). flutter test: 41 passed (30 original + 11 new telemetry tests), 3 failed (all pre-existing FakeAuthManager compilation errors). No new issues introduced. New tests verify TelemetryService interface, mock implementation, config defaults, and KiroApi DI integration.
